description_long: This is a vintage-style record player housed in a rectangular wooden case with a hinged lid that opens upward. The main body features a circular turntable platter with a wood-trimmed edge, a black tonearm, and several control knobs and switches on the right side. The front panel is fitted with a mesh speaker grille, and the corners are reinforced with black protective caps. The lid is decorated with a few colorful stickers, adding a personalized touch. The overall finish is a warm, polished wood grain, and the device appears portable, suitable for use in home or casual urban settings. The design is both functional and decorative, blending retro aesthetics with practical audio features.
description: A vintage wooden record player with a hinged lid, mesh speaker grille, and control knobs, featuring a warm wood finish and decorative stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, circular turntable platter, tonearm, control knobs, and mesh speaker grille.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the open lid, side latches, and partial view of the platter and controls.
description_view_2: Rear view of the closed lid, displaying decorative stickers and black corner protectors.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the open lid, platter, and control area from a different perspective.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and centrally located on the top surface. It has a wood-trimmed edge matching the case, with a black or dark gray surface. The platter is medium-sized relative to the overall device, with a smooth finish and a subtle central spindle. No visible grooves or elaborate patterns are present.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, black, and extends from the right side of the platter. It is straight, of moderate length, and appears to be made of metal or plastic with a matte finish. The tonearm is resting in its holder, not positioned over the platter, and has visible joints for movement.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is not clearly visible, but its location is implied at the end of the tonearm. It would be small and likely metallic or plastic, attached as a separate component.
attribute_control_knobs: There are several control knobs and switches on the right side of the top panel. The knobs are round, black, and of varying sizes, likely made of plastic or metal. They are arranged in a row, with no visible labels or markings from these views.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present as a hinged wooden lid matching the case. It is opaque, made of the same wood material, and is currently open. The lid is attached with metal hinges and features black corner protectors and decorative stickers. It is not transparent and does not have a handle.
